case_title: LANE, CHERYL A. VS MONTOYA, PETER

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT MONTOYA, PETER DEFT CHALLENGES VENUE & INDICATES THE CONTRACT SPECIFIES VENUE & RESOLUTION OF DISPUTES. PER THE CONTRACT ENTERED INTO BETWEEN THE PLTF & DEFT, "ANY CONTROVERSY OR CLAIM ARISING OUT OF OR RELATING TO THIS CONTRACT, OR BREACH THEREOF, SHALL BE SETTLED BY ARBITRATION IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE RULES OF THE AMERICAN ARBITRACTION ASSOC.. " STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLTF DECLARATION FILED; PROCESS SERVER UNABLE TO SERVE DEFT.
VENUE CHALLENGE FILED; NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARTIES
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO PETER MONTOYA RETURNED--FORWARD TIME EXPIRED
